title: genista tournefortii subsp. jahandiezii
intro: Genista tournefortii subsp. jahandiezii, also known as the Spanish broom or Genista jahandiezii, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Genista tournefortii subsp. jahandiezii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
